annotation_method: manual VULCA field overlay on true public-source screenshots

fields.customer_value: Shows where the generated-asset context came from.
Keeps model/tool context visible without making model-quality claims.
Defines which prompt, reference, or product-source material must travel with the output.
Separates output state and format from model benchmark or safety claims.

visual_cues: decision field in VULCA side panel
fields.customer_value: Treats AI label/disclosure as a routed decision, not a legal ruling.
Routes unresolved questions to product, platform, creative, or release owners.

known_limitations: BytePlus screenshots contain cookie or feedback overlays.
The overlay is not a SAM/DINO/Vision Banana segmentation output.
This artifact is suitable for internal review and should be replaced by a source-safe distilled card or redraw in customer-facing PDFs.
